title: 'We're living in a shed because of river pollution'
snippet: Jane and Tony Coyle spent seven years waiting for planning permission due to River Lugg pollution.

title: 'Millions' of pounds saved by replacing Palantir tech in refugee system
snippet: The government said its in-house IT system was "more flexible" while meeting "high standards" of security.

title: MPs call for sunbed advertising ban to help prevent skin cancer
snippet: A report by a cross-party group of MPs has found the majority of skin cancer cases are preventable.

title: Referee Beaton under police surveillance, says SFA
snippet: The SFA say referee John Beaton and his family were put "under police surveillance" in the wake of recent penalty controversy.

title: 'Pretty miraculous' - 11 rescued after pilot ditches plane in Atlantic
snippet: The survivors spent about five hours on a life raft before being rescued by the US Air Force off Florida's coast.

title: Posh sandwich has more salt than nearly five cheeseburgers
snippet: Action on Salt & Sugar said people should not be exposed to a "hidden health risk every time they buy lunch".

title: Three more VAR errors take mistake tally to 23
snippet: Three more video assistant referee errors are confirmed by the Premier League's Key Match Incidents panel, taking the total number this season to 23.

title: Global forest loss slows but El Niño fires could threaten progress
snippet: The loss of tropical rainforests eased last year, according to new analysis, but scientists warn they are still disappearing rapidly.

title: Inside the secretive and lucrative world of orchid breeding
snippet: It can take a decade to bring a new orchid to market, so breeders keep their hi-tech processes secret.

title: £20m mystery gift buys London Zoo new hospital where you can watch vets work
snippet: Visitors will be able to watch live veterinary procedures inside a state-of-the-art new animal hospital.

title: WhatsApp launches totally private 'incognito' conversations with its AI chatbot
snippet: A cyber security expert says deleting chat history could lead to a lack of accountability if things go wrong.

title: How worried should we be about hantavirus?
snippet: Passengers potentially exposed to hantavirus are being repatriated, so what is the risk to the wider public?

title: Zack Polanski did not vote in local elections, Green Party says
snippet: The Green Party leader previously told Hackney mayoral candidate Zoë Garbett "you have my vote".

title: Flattery and fanfare as Trump welcomed to China - but thorny issues remain
snippet: The leaders of the world's two superpowers were all smiles for the cameras during the US president's visit to Beijing.

title: Search for new James Bond officially kicks off as auditions begin
snippet: Callum Turner, Jacob Elordi and Harris Dickinson are among the frontrunners to replace Daniel Craig.
